reviews.review_description: The game is very good. All climbing was great. PVP was great. It does need some work though ￼ I love how you can get around the maps very quickly I love how the characters look the keyboard is great it’s a bit hard to pick a colour. I love how there’s a free top hat when you get into the game. It’s a great you really need to play this game like you really do and I’ve heard that it’s gonna get updates frequently￼ this game is great. You should get this game. You should get this game. You should get this game and you should get this game. You should get this game. You should get this game. ￼
I've seen loads of games and this has the potential to be so much more project hope is a go to.
